author: Dylan Kasanders
review: I would not recommend this place, as the management team does not seem to care about resolving the issues of their renters.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Dylan, we are very sorry to hear about the condition of your room upon move-in. We want to ensure that every resident moves into a clean and prepared room. We would love to speak more about the issues with maintenance requests with you to get more feedback. Maintaining our property and our apartments is very important to us and we would love to improve beyond your experiences and beyond your expectations. Please give us a call at (360) 778 - 1500 or email us at live@larkbellingham.com so we may talk further about your experience living at Lark.

author: Nate Oostra
review: You treat your adult residents like children expecting them to follow these ridiculous demands, you can leave your room spotless when you leave and they will hit you with the you didnt do something right, pay us even more moneyas if you

ownerResponse.text: Dear Nate, there were reported gunshots in April 2022 at around 12:30am as a party in an apartment was being broken up.  We called Bellingham Police to disperse the party and the gunshots occurred while police and management were already on site.  Thankfully there were no injuries.  We immediately terminated the occupancy of the residents that hosted the party.

author: Alex Willis
review: Would not recommend. I nearly got towed twice because I had to park in a reserved spot due to the fact that there was rarely ever any visitor spots available as well as reserved parking passes to be able to park in those designated spots. I also got charged a ton for minor damages such as a tiny stain or a bended blind(500 bucks).

ownerResponse.text: Hi Alex, we are sorry to hear your experience at Lark was not a great one. Parking really is a struggle for all student housing in this area, which is why we recommend securing your reserved parking spot early. While we understand how hard it is to have your car towed, we also strive to make sure that once a parking spot has been reserved, it will be available for the person who has reserved it. If you have any other questions please contact us at live@larkbellingham.com,

author: Spewnami
review: Absolutely do not recommend. They're very aggressive in marketing lease renewals and are not honest. They will try to gouge you for every penny. I had a scratched piece of furniture they wanted replaced with ~%400 mark up. Even at a 10% &

ownerResponse.text: We are sad to see the 1 star review and would love to discuss your experience further.  Unfortunately, we are unable to locate any contact information for you in our computer system, so if you would reach out to us at live@larkbellingham.com we'd be happy to discuss your concerns.

author: leroy jenkins

If you or your daughter could please contact us regarding any concerns, we will work to address them.

Please don't hesitate to reach out to us at (360) 778-1500 and we would be happy to discuss these concerns in more detail for you.

When a unit is inspected after move-out, we have to charge for any additional cleaning or damage repairs as needed so that the unit is in move-in ready condition for the next resident moving in. We appreciate your honest feedback as it helps us make improvements toward our property. Please reach out if there is every anything else we can help you with.

review: Most disorganized place ever. They will pester you to renew from day one. Then run a rather scammy tactic of saying they rented your room for the new lease term, despite giving a written renewal offer giving you well in to August to renew

If our residents notice it is not working properly, we encourage them to notify our staff.  We look forward to hearing from you soon.

review: This place sounded too good to be true when I signed my lease last year during their huge advertising push on campus. And, it was. NXNW was not the worst place to live but it's also not what they say it will be. When I signed, they said

author: Shane Wood
review: Over priced hollow living experience. I will say that they do their best to keep everything clean and well maintained but I do know someone who's sink fell into the bottom of their counter...so there is that. My friend has lived here for

ownerResponse.text: Shane, thank you for your review. Any sort of maintenance issues that residents have should be addressed with our maintenance team. We do love our convenient location and having both Fred Meyer as well as Whole Foods next to our property.

author: Kelly Paulson
review: Living here has been great so far, apartments looked wonderful upon, my only issues have been the fact that i pay for a parking spot I can barely get in and out of because they do not enforce no parking on the fire lane attached to my

author: Tommi Adams
review: Ive lived at Lark for a year now and have yet had to run across any problems. Maintenance has always been extremely fast and ready to fix any problem that is needed. The Lark staff as well works fast and makes sure that everything you need is ready and there for you. Love it here!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Tommi, thanks for taking the time to share your experience. We are so happy to hear that you have enjoyed living the Lark lifestyle, and we have enjoyed having you as part of our community. If there's anything we can do for you, let us know!

author: Hailey Brother
review: Rooms are furnished and are perfect for off campus housing! NXNW has community events that helps connect residents and makes everyone feel welcome! They also have so many amenities like free coffee, wifi and cable are available, a gym with

ownerResponse.text: Hailey, thank you so much for your review! We love hearing from residents about their experience at NXNW.  If you ever have any questions for us please feel free to contract our office or stop by the clubhouse.

author: B
review: Reserved spots are not enforced at all. I have spent an extra $30 a month, totaling close to $500, to have the same parking rights as people who do not pay a premium for parking. It is unfair. Management claimed their new solution to

ownerResponse.text: We are sorry to hear your experience with NXNW has not been the most positive one. As for our parking lot, it was constructed based on the city zoning laws and is in compliance with those regulations. As for enforcement, Washington state law does not allow us to patrol our lot for improperly parked vehicles. If there is a vehicle parked improperly resident's can request for the vehicle to be towed. This service is available 24 hours a day. As for the fire you mentioned, it was contained that same night and did not affect any buildings. The Fire Department ruled out the possibility of arson on the scene. We too were sorry to see the market go, but this was a decision made by the vendor due to a high amount of items not being paid for. We sent out two notices about the change to residents. We send out offers to residents about renewing each time we have a new special or deadline, so we can keep resident's informed about renewing. We would love to have a conversation about the concerns you have brought up, but unfortunately due to the anonymous nature of the review we are unable to reach out to your directly. Please feel free to call us at 360.778.1500, e-mail us at live@nxnw-bellingham.com or come down to the leasing office to discuss this further.

author: Connie johnson
review: I am a resident and an employee NXNW is the best apartment complex I have ever lived in. Clean, new, fully furnished,  and put together. I have lived in a lot of apartment complexes and NXNW is the best apartment complex i have ever lived

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your review, Connie. We are happy to have you as a resident and employee as well.

author: GodNuggetz
review: Been living here for a year super nice place with kind staff and tons of commodities, only problems I've ever had is payment on their website besides that awesome place.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us.  We are glad to read that your overall experience has been an enjoyable one.  If we can be of any further assistance, please do not hesitate reaching out to us.

author: Sophia Lazich
review: I think the parking situation makes this place unlivable. It's not fair to be paying $700 a month and still have to drive around for 20 minutes after work trying to find a spot, only to wake up the next morning to a ticket for parking in

author: Danny Aimone
review: To give you an example of how much Lark actually cares for their tenants, let me layout how I was recently treated. I have lived here the entire year with my car and recently found out my car was towed. How I found out is where the issue

ownerResponse.text: Dan, we are concerned to learn that you are not enjoying your experience to the fullest extent - your vehicle which is registered with resident parking, was reported as being parked in a reserved stall. When you register your vehicle with Lark there are clear polices about where you are allowed to park based on the permit you have. We have sent our parking rules and regulations to our residents reminding them of these policies. Security is on site from Thursday through Sunday and they have a required route, so they can patrol the entire complex. There is no specific security guard assigned to Lark, this is why there are different security guards throughout the year. We are more than happy to discuss your concerns further if you would stop by the office or e-mail us at live@larkbellingham.com.

author: Tayler McInerny
review: The apartment itself is really nice. its awesome to find an updated place in Bellingham, unlike the several houses and apartments I've lived in before that have had mold, ants and a number of other issues.

ownerResponse.text: Tayler, thank you so much for your feedback.  We are glad to hear that your experience at NXNW has been an enjoyable one.  If we can be of any assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

author: Cheyenne Gillespie
review: They dont reply to emails after youve moved in, the shuttle has been a nightmare because it is smaller and theres only one. Parking IS NOT enforced . I pay $30 a month and emailed them about so many people parking in the reserved but

ownerResponse.text: Cheyenne, we appreciate your feedback and review of Lark Bellingham.  We've already reached out and left you a voicemail in regards to the matter at hand. Looking at our email correspondences we replied with in a 24 hour time frame. There are a few ways to get to campus from Lark Bellingham - during peak times the shuttle does get full, if and when that happens WTA has put in a bus stop right at the bottom of our driveway that is freely accessible to WWU students. We do appreciate all of our residents and their feedback. Please give us a call back at your convenience - 360-778-1500.

We appreciate your feedback in stating your concerns, and are always here should you want to reach out to us in the future.

review: Every e-mail you get from them will raise your blood pressure.  They tell you to buy renter's insurance.  You buy policy.  They change insurers.  Insurer charges you for yet another policy.  You dispute new charge, they tag you for NSF

author: Penny Lockbeam
review: Rent is due on the first but you can't move in until the 15th or 16th. Does this mean I get to move out on the middle of the month and if not, Why do we have to pay for 2 weeks of not being able to live here, I know that is not legal. There

ownerResponse.text: Penny, I am sorry your experience with NXNW has not been a positive one. Whenever you see something irregular or out of the ordinary please alert the office or management in a timely manner so we can address it. author: Holly Hobby
review: Always take photos when you move in or out. These people will charge you a fee if theres a fly in the apartment. They will also take their damages that were there already from the previous tenant and charge you. Beware.

ownerResponse.text: Holly, thank you for taking the time to share your experience with Lark Bellingham. Because it is always our number one priority to provide or residents with the best places to live while maintaining fair and consistent policies, we would greatly appreciate you reaching out to us at live@larkbellingham.com so that we can discuss your individual situtaion and make any adjustments as required.

author: Nicholas Kim
review:
Good:
- It is a very nice place, get your own room and bathroom.
- Very fancy and provides a gym and student shuttle.

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate your feedback and if we can assist you in any way please reach out to us at your earliest convenience.  You are more than welcome to stop by the office, contact us at 360.778.1500 or email us at office@nxnw-bellingham.com at your earliest convenience.

author: Monica Weber
review: If I can rate my experience here, it would be 0 stars. They charged me $280 for a replacement dresser when the fix for it could take 5 minutes and 2 screws. They will do anything to get money out of you, including flooding the apartment,

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Monica, thank you for providing feedback. We are sad to hear that you had an unpleasant experience at Lark. For the dresser, we did have to replace the entire thing. However, as you know, our Resident Services Manager was able to offer you a reduction of the amount of the dresser, resulting in less than the original $280 charge. As for the flood, our maintenance staff was able to address the situation the same day. We would love to address any further concerns you may have.
Please reach out to us at Live@larkbellingham.com and we would be happy to talk at any time. Thank you.

author: jonny bravo
review: I HATE IT HERE . FREEE MEEE . THEY CAN KICK YOU OUT WHEN THEY FEEL LIKE IT BUT WONT LET YOU LEAVEEEEEEEEE

ownerResponse.text: Hi Jonny, we apologize that you are not satisfied with your time here at Lark. We would love to hear more about your experience and additional feedback. Please give us a call at (360) 778-1500 or email us at live@larkbellingham.com so we may talk more about how we can improve the remainder of your stay.

author: Thnh L
review: This apartment has modern decoration, during this pandemic time staff are so nice and helpful. My roommates are the best roommates I ever had, they are so nice. The best way to enjoy college life.

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Ken,

Thank you for your response. We love seeing you tag us on social media and are glad you are having a nice time here.

author: Debbie Tully
review: Be aware of their move out policy. My son paid the penalty fee for an extra 24 hours to vacate his apartment, but staff and vendors cleared it within the 24 hours and without his permission. There was also no system in place: some items

ownerResponse.text: Debbie, thank you for your feedback and review of our community.  Our accounts manager has already spoken with you about this matter. When we go into the apartment upon move out, we do identify items of value and importance, and things that are irreplaceable. This would include documents, electronics, clothes, etc. When it comes to trashing out any other items, this would be any trash that was left such as toiletries, dishes, pans, household items, etc. A holdover fee was assessed due to the apartment still being occupied past his agreement end date. Our staff did reach out to Joseph on move out to explain that there was a fee being assessed, and he confirmed he would be getting his items that night. It is simply a holdover fee for not turning in keys on time, we still take possession of the apartment at that time. As he did not come to remove his belongings that night, at that point, we do go in and begin clearing the apartment.  We did bag and tag his items, and then set it aside in our office for him to come pick them up. If you have any further questions about this, please reach out to our office at 360-778-1500 or office@larkbellingham.com

author: Kim Robertson
review: I wish there was a zero star...alas but I have to give one.  My son lived there for a year.  Early spring before move out in August he kept getting hammered to sign a lease for the next year.  He did so and then they told him he did not

ownerResponse.text: Kim, we appreciate your feedback and review of your experience at our community.  Thank you for taking the time to further discuss your concerns with us directly after this review.  We're glad we could work out a solution together.  Please do not hesitate to reach out to us if we can assist you further.

author: Sonja Hansen
review: This place was perfect for what I needed - a fully furnished apartment close to Western that offered roommate matching & has solid wifi. I'll be the first to admit that I didn't really take advantage of the test kitchen or play volleyball, but it was always an option. Nice to have a Fred Meyer and a bus stop right by, too.

ownerResponse.text: Sonja, thank you so much for your review.  We love our prime location, amenities and multiple transportation options to campus as well. We are sorry to see you leave NXNW, but thank you for being a resident with us while you were a student at WWU!

author: Annabel Jordan
review: I like having my own bathroom and I do think the price is worth it, the 24/7 gym is also a plus. I wish there was more parking but overall a good place to live

ownerResponse.text: Hi Annabel, thank you for your review. We are glad to see that you are enjoying living at Lark, thanks for being a part of our Lark family!

author: Kate Welch
review: Be forewarned, they utilize extremely predatory leasing practices and their staff is completely unhelpful in every way. I signed a lease here and attempted to cancel it before move-in and was given the runaround from the staff, who seem to

ownerResponse.text: Kathryn, I am sorry to hear your experience with NXNW was not what you expected it to be. Someone from the management team has already reached out to you about the back fill process and your spot has already been filled. We are more than willing to discuss your situation further and explain the back fill process and its compliance with Washington State Law. As always, you can call the office at 360.778.1500 or email us at live@nxnw-bellingham.com.

author: Benjamin Follett
review: There are small caveats that I have with NXNW. The gym is a bit small, the maintenance requests took way longer than the ETA, the shuttle still isn't ready, and rent is expensive. All that aside though, this place is very nice and you really get what you pay for.

author: Natalie Storm
review: The 5 star reviews are fake from Asset Plus Company employees. By far the worst apartment management I have ever dealt with. Severely overpriced, false advertising, aggressive/insecure leasing manager Aaron making threats when tenants speak

ownerResponse.text: Natalie, we appreciate your feedback, but we want to make sure that your experience while living at NXNW is an enjoyable one. It is important to us that our residents know that the management office is a resource for them, and we are here to help resolve any issues or concerns to the best of our ability. We have made some staff changes as of this summer to ensure excellent customer service is provided. We have also reached out to a third-party company when this was brought to our attention and had the insulation corrected. In addition, we have also made enhancements with our current security company to further support our residents. Please contact our office should you wish to discuss further, we would be more than happy to address any further concerns with you.

author: Paige Eberhard
review: I haven't moved in yet, but I am way beyond excited to. As a transfer student I feel like I missed out on making friends since I didn't get to experience the "dorm life". But NXNW gives me that chance to have that experience and be

author: Bret Serres
review: Lark is awesome, they always have super awesome events going on and fun giveaways. The office staff are very helpful and super nice. Would definitely recommend living here.

ownerResponse.text: Bret, we greatly appreciate you taking the time to share your experiences at Lark Bellingham and are happy to provide our residents with awesome events and experiences as a part of living at Lark Bellingham. We always aim to provide awesome places to live along with amazing customer experiences and look foward to continueing to serve you.

author: Steven Stiles
review: Parking here is garbage. Paying $30 extra monthly for parking does not guarantee you a spot. However the complex is fairly nice and new and the amenities are useful. The staff is usually friendly and willing to help.

ownerResponse.text: Steven, we are sorry to hear that your experience with our reserved parking has not gone as expected.  The additional $30 is for the reserved parking, and we encourage our residents to call the office if someone is parked in your spot.  We have an operator who will direct your call to one of the two managers who will assist you with towing.  If we can answer any further questions for you, please do not hesitate reaching out to us.

author: Jared Strand
review: My daughter has had nothing but bad things to say about her experience here. This place dresses up the common areas to sell it to parents but it is an unmanaged, dangerous complex.

ownerResponse.text: Jared, we are sorry that your daughter seems to have some unresolved issues with NXNW from last year's leasing term. Please note that as of last spring, NXNW was acquired by new ownership and management. A member of our management team will be reaching out to you directly. In the mean time if you have any questions or concerns always feel free to contact us at live@nxnw-bellingham.com

author: Justin Taylor (J_ Taylor)
review: Nice new place.  600 parking spots needed. 400 parking spots provided.  You do the math every evening trying to park, and parking blocks away in unsecured areas. NEEDS PARKING

ownerResponse.text: Justin, we appreciate your feedback concerning the parking at NXNW.  We were recently acquired by new ownership and are undergoing some improvements.  If we can help address any concerns or issues that you might still have, please stop by the office or email us at office@nxnw-bellingham.com at your earliest convenience.  We look forward to hearing from you soon.

author: Jasmine
review: Not enough windows and there are no normal apartments

ownerResponse.text: Hi Jasmine, thank you for taking the time to leave your feedback. We're sorry that your visit with us didn't live up to your expectations. As a complex that is designed to serve our local student population, we have some unique features that include walk in closets and private baths in each bed space. Feel free to call us (360)778-1500 with any specific questions or concerns, and we will be happy to chat with you further.

author: Ali Nazy
review: I have enjoyed my time living at Lark Bellingham and I am looking forward to another year of living here! The staff is very accommodating and friendly. They make sure any issues that come up are taken care of quickly and efficiently! I would recommend living here!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Ali, thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We enjoy having you as a resident with us. We can't wait to start the new term. Please reach out if you ever need anything.

author: James Mitchell
review: DO NOT PAY FOR PARKING. They will charge you money for reserved parking and do absolutely nothing about people who don't pay for parking taking up the reserved spots. They do nothing about issues and just play games with you over email. The management at this complex is absolutely awful.

ownerResponse.text: James, our Resident Services Manager has attempted to reach out to you about the proper procedure for reporting an improperly parked vehicle since due to Washington State laws we cannot patrol the parking lot. We have also attempted to schedule a meeting with you so we can discuss your concerns directly, but you did not come to the meeting. Our office will be reaching out to you again, so we can hopefully schedule a time to address your concerns further.

author: HUSSAM Alsubaie
review: It's a good place to live in however, there is now spots to park and its not save to park your car in some of it's parking, it's dark and no cameras are which makes it easier to be stolen and that had happened alot

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for taking the time to share your experiences in living at Lark Bellingham. We are sorry to hear of the challenges you have been experiencing related to parking onsite. As our management team works diligently to implement additional parking enforcement and security procedures, we would love for you to call our swing by the leasing office to further discuss your individual experiences.

author: Mark MacDonald
review: Great place to work and live with helpful and supportive staff members. There's a large community vibe thanks to the volleyball courts, BBQ's, fire pits and ping pong tables available to all residents in the courtyard. Love being a part of the team and NXNW community.

author: joel con
review: Parking is atrocious as well as the cleanup of the dumpster area. As far as the help is concerned with requests it is usually just figure it out yourself.

ownerResponse.text: Joel, thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We are sorry to hear your experience with us has not been a positive one but we are grateful for the feedback. To address concerns over parking, we have implemented a new parking system for the upcoming year, with assigned spaces on each reserved parking pass. As for the dumpster area, we hear your concerns and are working diligently on creating a new system to ensure that trash and recycling guidelines are being followed to ensure trash is picked up in a timely manner by the city. Please don't hesitate to reach out to us at (360) 778-1500 or live@larkbellingham.com to discuss your concerns in more detail.

author: yo wyo
review: Just moved here with roommate . you basically would be better off being HOMELESS

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for leaving us a review. We are sorry to hear that your move-in experience was unsatisfactory. We would love to hear more feedback from you so we may provide a better move-in experience in the future. Please call us at (360) 778-1500 or email us at live@larkbellingham.com so we can help improve your time at Lark.

author: Ariana Au
review: I like the amenities, resident events, and most of the staff I've interacted with are great, but I dislike that I can't count on a sure way to and from school with the shuttle & that the emails don't give enough time to find an alternative way back

ownerResponse.text: Ariana, thank you for taking the time to give a shout out to one of our employees.  We have a great team at Lark Bellingham and  are so excited to have you become a resident next year! Move in is around the corner and please let us know if we can be of any further assistance.

author: Kaylie Kummer
review: I love it here!  The staff are all so friendly, and the main areas are really nice.  My apartment is perfect, and I have not had any problems with anything!

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Kaylie,

Thank you for your feedback. We are so glad to hear that you are enjoying living here! Don't hesitate to reach out if you ever need anything.

author: Eric Jensen
review: I have lived here half a year. Loved it already and have renewed as well as upgraded for next year. Verry pretty, has alot of little services that are very useful. Large rooms

ownerResponse.text: Eric, we appreciate your review and are glad you decided to live with us for another year.  We are glad you are enjoying the many amenities we offer our residents in the clubhouse. Please let us know if there is anything else we can do for you.

author: Courtney Neveu
review: the staff is amazing and whenever I have questions, they make sure that they get back to you the same day fi I emailed them about my concerns. I am really excited to move in to my new apartment!!.

author: Athena McCormack
review: I absolutely love Lark! The only complaint that I have is that the trash and recycling are often always overflowing, but other than that the staff is great and so are my neighbors!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Athena, Thank you so much for your feedback. We have recently been able to add cardboard recycling back to our property and hope that the trash overflows less now. We are glad to hear you are having a nice time here!

review: Been living here for a year. No problems so far. Office is always ready to help you with any kind of problems and the maintenance is super fast here

ownerResponse.text: Hi, thank you for your review. We are glad to see that you are enjoying living at Lark, thanks for being a part of our Lark family!

author: nolan stansberry
review: I had a problem logging in and called the main building and I wasnt really in a good mood because of it and the girl who picked up the phone was a named McKenzie R. And she was so helpful and was so nice on the phone she was the 3rd person I have met there and they all had the same wonderful costumer service

ownerResponse.text: Nolan, thank you for taking the time to share you positive customer experience with a member of our Experience Team Member staff. We pride ourselves on providing the best place for students to live, and the best customer experiences in Bellingham. Thank you for choosing Lark Bellingham!

author: Linnea Nordquist
review: so sweet. love the office people.

ownerResponse.text: Linnea, thank you for leaving us this kind review and sharing your experiences at Lark Bellingham. We love our staff too!

author: Madeline Brusky
review: Lark has awful sound deadening windows and no way to speak with management or security after hours. Good luck

ownerResponse.text: Hey Madeline, thank you for taking the time to share your experiences and feedback with us, we greatly value your input. We strive to address any issues that may arise in timely and  at Lark Bellingham in an efficient manner.

author: Cindy Howard
review: Nice place but be prepared to pay rent for 2 weeks that you can't even live there and the false advertising on their website about "plenty of onsite parking options".

author: Victoria Carlson
review: Being a continuing resident and employee at NXNW has been a blessing. I wouldnt want to live anywhere but here, in Bellingham.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your review, Victoria.  We are happy to have you as a resident and employee as well.

author: Mucille Co.
review: Stay far away! Would not recommend. Terribly manipulative company owned by a larger company. Doesn't get much worse..

ownerResponse.text: We are concerned about your report of a negative experience at our community.  We are unable to locate any record of you as a current or previous resident.  If you would e-mail us at live@larkbellingham.com, we would be happy to assist you further.

author: Marian Bills
review: Phenomenal staff and friendly community! Apartment is well designed and comfortable

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Marian,

Thank you so much for your review! We appreciate your feedback. Please reach out if you ever need anything -- we're always here to help.

author: Mister Latro
review: If you like fleas, you'll love Lark!

ownerResponse.text: We are extremely sorry to hear that you have experienced an issue related to fleas at Lark Bellingham. We are unable to contact you with your screen name, so please do not hesitate to reach out to us immediately at (360) 778-1500, live@larkbellingham.com or by visiting our leasing office. We want to make sure we can assist you as soon as possible.

author: Aimee Bordeaux
review: DON'T GO HERE. For the love of god, this complex is absolutely horrible. Stay away from it like the plague.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Aimee, thank you for taking the time to provide feedback. We would like to discuss your experience at Lark Bellingham but we are failing to find you in our system.  Please email us at live@larkbelligham.com or call the office at 360-778-1500 so we can further discuss your experience and work towards solutions.

author: Austin pieper
review: The staff is always friendly, They have lots of green space for my dog.

ownerResponse.text: Austin, thank you for the review!  We love all of our furry resident's and are glad they enjoy the green space to play and have fun.

author: Ceci Vazquez
review: Nice and clean 5 min from downtown and 2 min from Fred Meyers woods coffee little cesar

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate your feedback and glad to see you are enjoying our close proximity to local amenities.

author: Trenton Shaflik
review: I can tell from the organization the staff has, along with their friendliness, living here is going to be amazing! So fricken excited

author: Sam Magno
review: Heard they use to have the number 1 ranked tourer on the west coast, very impressive!

ownerResponse.text: Sam, thank you for your review and kind words about our staff.  It is true according to J Turner that we had two of the top rated Housing Consultants on the West Coast for giving tours.  Our staff is always here to assist our residents in the best way we can.

author: Henry Leenstra
review: Amenities are always nice and the neighborhood always feels safe, as it is gated.

author: Ethan Forsberg
review: Love it here! Staff is amazing and accommodations are priceless!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Ethan, thank you so much for the kind comment. We love having you stop by the office as well as having you as a resident. Please reach out if you ever need anything!

author: adam poss
review: Staff is awesome and helpful can't wait to get into my be apartment

author: Amanda Marie
review: The two kenzies that work here are so sweet and helpful!!!

ownerResponse.text: Amanda, thank you for taking the time to share your experience with the staff at Lark Bellingham. We think we have a pretty amazing team too!

author: Zachary Toombs
review: Everyone who lives there can't stop talking about one of two things, the huge appartments or the crappy parking.

ownerResponse.text: Zachary, thank you for your review about our property. In regards to our parking lot, it was constructed based on the city zoning laws and is in compliance with those regulations. We do offer reserved parking, if our residents want to ensure they have a guaranteed parking spot. Otherwise we offer first come, first serve general parking to residents and designated visitor parking spots for our guest. If you would like to discuss parking or any other amenities at our property, please feel free to reach out to our office at live@nxnw-bellingham.com or by phone at 360.778.1500.

author: Richard Peterson
review: Brand new housing units! Very nice residences for students !

ownerResponse.text: Richard, we are glad to see that you are enjoying your apartment and are having a great experience while living at NXNW.  If we can assist you in any way, please don't hesitate to stop by the office or contact us at your earliest convenience.

author: Maegan Barrett
review: They really don't understand how to investigate people who are drinking under age and smoking pot underage.

ownerResponse.text: Maegan, we are sorry to hear your experience with NXNW has not been a positive one. We would love to speak with you further about your experience with us, but based on our records we do not have you as a current or past resident with us and are unable to contact you directly. Please feel free to call us at 360.778.1500 or email us at live@nxnw-bellingham.com at your earliest convenience.

author: Quinton Rundell
review: Its cool for sure dont know what it is but aparently ive been there

author: Shachaf zm
review: Best place to live at. Close to WWU, AMAZING for the price

ownerResponse.text: Shachaf, thank you for your feedback! We are happy to hear you are enjoying your time as an NXNW resident.

author: Madison Roper
review: Great apartment & amenities but poor communication & parking.

author: Bella Yoho
review: Stop littering all over WWU's campus!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for taking the time to leave us a rating. We appreciate you reaching out about your concerns and due to your feedback, we requested and received approval from our parent company to eliminate our flying efforts on campus. If you'd like to discuss further, please reach out at (360) 778-1500 or at live@larkbellingham.com at your earliest convenience.

author: Keith Strom
review: Has a market area that sometimes have communal treats.

ownerResponse.text: Keith, we appreciate your review.  We love our market area as well, and if there is anything you would like to see more of in the market please let us know.
